values.description: Must match ADMIN_KEY env on the gateway. ≥32 chars in production/staging; anything in dev.
Matches CRON_SECRET env on the gateway. Optional — only needed to hit /internal/cron/tick.
Populated by `_Setup / 2. Create merchant` test script.
Populated by `_Setup / 2. Create merchant` test script. Plaintext, unrecoverable after first response — lose it, create a new merchant.
Populated by `_Setup / 2. Create merchant` when webhookUrl was set. Plaintext HMAC signing secret for outgoing webhooks the gateway sends to the merchant.
Populated by any `Create invoice` request. Consumed by the webhook simulator so synthetic payloads target the right address.
Generic fallback. Populated by `_Setup / 4. Bootstrap Alchemy webhooks` with the first `created` signing key. Each chain also gets its own `alchemySigningKey_<chainId>` entry.
Used by the parametric `Create invoice` / `Plan payout` requests. Chain IDs: 1=ETH, 10=OP, 56=BSC, 137=Polygon, 8453=Base, 42161=Arbitrum, 43114=AVAX, 900=Solana, 728126428=Tron, 999=dev.
Used by the parametric requests. Check the token registry for which symbols are valid per chain (USDC, USDT, SOL, DEV).
Raw integer token units. 1000000 = 1.000000 USDC/USDT on 6-decimal chains. For BSC USDC/USDT (18 decimals) use 1000000000000000000 for 1 token.
Used by the parametric `Plan payout` request. Must be the correct address format for the target chain (hex for EVM, base58 for Tron/Solana).
